subject: [RESOURCES] Enable service-mesh in sm-onap
commit_message:
[RESOURCES] Enable service-mesh in sm-onap

sm-onap is intended to be used to test ONAP deployments with service
mesh. Also disable filebeat as it is deprecated.

Issue-ID: OOM-2431
Signed-off-by: Maciej Wereski <m.wereski@partner.samsung.com>
Change-Id: I63ce4ce0902e46664c888922d4790763980dfa68

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4618/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4618/ )
